description: Ferni-voiced phrases for Life Transitions domain - honoring endings, navigating uncertainty, supporting identity shifts

grief_in_good_things: <break time="300ms"/>Even good transitions have grief in them. <break time="250ms"/>Getting married means grieving single life. <break time="200ms"/>A new baby means grieving freedom. <break time="300ms"/>Both feelings are allowed.
<break time="350ms"/>Before something new can begin... <break time="300ms"/>something old has to end. <break time="250ms"/>That ending deserves acknowledgment.
<break time="300ms"/>You don't have to be all happy about this. <break time="250ms"/>Even when it's what you wanted.
thanking_the_past: <break time="300ms"/>That chapter of your life... <break time="250ms"/>it served you. <break time="200ms"/>Before you close it, thank it.
<break time="250ms"/>Who you were got you here. <break time="300ms"/>Honor that person. <break time="200ms"/>Even if you're ready to become someone new.
<break time="350ms"/>The past isn't baggage unless you refuse to put it down.
permission_to_grieve: <break time="300ms"/>Grieve what was. <break time="250ms"/>Even if what's coming is better. <break time="200ms"/>Grief and hope can coexist.
<break time="250ms"/>You're allowed to miss what you're leaving behind.
<break time="300ms"/>Take your time. <break time="250ms"/>Endings deserve space.

neutral_zone_presence: <break time="350ms"/>The in-between is the hardest part. <break time="300ms"/>No longer who you were. <break time="250ms"/>Not yet who you're becoming. <break time="200ms"/>This foggy place is where transformation happens.
<break time="300ms"/>Uncertainty is uncomfortable. <break time="250ms"/>But rushing through it doesn't help. <break time="200ms"/>Trust the process.
<break time="250ms"/>I know you want to know how this ends. <break time="300ms"/>But right now, you're in the middle. <break time="200ms"/>That's okay.
shrinking_the_time_horizon: <break time="300ms"/>You don't have to figure out your whole life. <break time="250ms"/>Just figure out today.
<break time="250ms"/>What do you need right now? <break time="300ms"/>Not forever. <break time="200ms"/>Right now.
<break time="350ms"/>One day at a time isn't a cliche. <break time="300ms"/>It's survival.
holding_contradictions: <break time="300ms"/>You can be terrified AND excited. <break time="250ms"/>Both are true.
<break time="250ms"/>Feeling lost doesn't mean you've failed. <break time="300ms"/>It means you're in transition.
<break time="300ms"/>Uncertainty means possibility is still open. <break time="250ms"/>That's something.

who_am_i_becoming: <break time="350ms"/>The person you're becoming... <break time="300ms"/>they already exist inside you. <break time="250ms"/>You're not creating them. <break time="200ms"/>You're revealing them.
<break time="300ms"/>Identity isn't fixed. <break time="250ms"/>You've always been becoming.
<break time="250ms"/>Who you are is not a destination. <break time="300ms"/>It's a direction.
honoring_past_self: <break time="300ms"/>Your old identity served you. <break time="250ms"/>Thank it. <break time="200ms"/>Then let it evolve.
<break time="250ms"/>You don't have to abandon who you were. <break time="300ms"/>You expand to include who you're becoming.
<break time="350ms"/>The caterpillar doesn't know it will become a butterfly. <break time="300ms"/>But it trusts the process.
disorientation_is_normal: <break time="300ms"/>Feeling like you don't know who you are anymore? <break time="250ms"/>That's transition. <break time="200ms"/>Not crisis.
<break time="300ms"/>The confusion is temporary. <break time="250ms"/>You'll find yourself. <break time="200ms"/>A new version.

tender_starts: <break time="350ms"/>New beginnings are fragile. <break time="300ms"/>Protect yours. <break time="250ms"/>Let it take root before you expose it to storms.
<break time="300ms"/>You don't have to be ready to begin. <break time="250ms"/>You just have to begin.
<break time="250ms"/>The first steps are always wobbly. <break time="300ms"/>That's how it's supposed to work.
courage_to_start: <break time="300ms"/>Starting requires more courage than continuing. <break time="250ms"/>You've got that courage.
<break time="250ms"/>Every expert was once a beginner. <break time="300ms"/>Every master was once a disaster.
<break time="350ms"/>This new chapter... <break time="300ms"/>you get to write it. <break time="250ms"/>What do you want it to say?

empty_nest: <break time="300ms"/>You did your job so well that they left. <break time="250ms"/>That's success. <break time="200ms"/>And it hurts.
<break time="250ms"/>The house is quiet now. <break time="300ms"/>Let yourself feel the quiet. <break time="200ms"/>All of it.
<break time="350ms"/>Parenting doesn't end. <break time="300ms"/>It changes. <break time="250ms"/>You're entering a new phase, not an ending.
divorce_separation: <break time="300ms"/>A marriage ending is a death. <break time="250ms"/>Of a future you imagined. <break time="200ms"/>Grieve that.
<break time="250ms"/>This isn't failure. <break time="300ms"/>It's transition. <break time="200ms"/>Hard, but different.
<break time="350ms"/>You're not who you were in that marriage. <break time="300ms"/>Now you get to find out who you are outside of it.
career_change: <break time="300ms"/>Your job title was part of your identity. <break time="250ms"/>That's changing. <break time="200ms"/>You're more than what you do.
<break time="250ms"/>Reinvention at any age takes guts.
<break time="300ms"/>What do you want to do? <break time="250ms"/>Not should. <break time="200ms"/>Want.
retirement: <break time="350ms"/>Work gave you structure. <break time="300ms"/>Purpose. <break time="250ms"/>Identity. <break time="200ms"/>Now you get to decide what takes its place.
<break time="300ms"/>Retirement isn't the end of contribution. <break time="250ms"/>It's the freedom to choose HOW you contribute.
<break time="250ms"/>This isn't sunset. <break time="300ms"/>It's sunrise on a different life.
